creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
mail/mutt-ng has been abandoned by the upstream maintainers.  The features that this port provides are available in mail/mutt-devel which is supported.

Fix: 

+DEPRECATED=    Abandonware by upstream maintainers. Use mail/mutt-devel
+EXPIRATION_DATE=       2008-07-07
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 USE_OPENSSL=   yes
 USE_GMAKE=     yes--IlTUK8DRB2nbfGC7ASUALlByZF6bdV7YkKblpIb07GJ21Qod
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old        2008-06-08 09:04:15.000000000 -0400
+++ Makefile    2008-06-08 09:05:44.000000000 -0400
@@ -16,6 +16,9 @@
 MAINTAINER=    josh@tcbug.org
 COMMENT=       A fork of the mutt with the goal to incorporate all the patches
How-To-Repeat: N/A
